## OnboardingMenu

**Import:** `import {OnboardingMenu} from '@gravity-ui/components';`

```typescript
interface OnboardingMenuProps {
  expanded: boolean;
  onCompleteClick: (event: React.MouseEvent) => void;
  progress: number;
  title: React.ReactNode;
  collapseButtonText?: string;
  completeButtonText?: string;
  icon?: IconData;
  liningClassName?: string;
  onCloseClick?: (event: React.MouseEvent) => void;
  onCollapseClick?: (event: React.MouseEvent) => void;
  onExpand?: (expanded: boolean) => void;
  withCloseButton?: boolean;
}
```

interface PromoSheetProps {
  actionText: string;
  closeText: string;
  message: string;
  title: string;
  actionHref?: string;
  contentClassName?: string;
  imageAlt?: string;
  imageClassName?: string;
  imageContainerClassName?: string;
  imageSrc?: string;
  onActionClick?: ButtonProps;
  onClose?: SheetProps;
}

## ShareOptions

**Import:** `import {ShareOptions} from '@gravity-ui/components';`

## ShareLayoutDirection

**Import:** `import {ShareLayoutDirection} from '@gravity-ui/components';`

## ShareList

**Import:** `import {ShareList} from '@gravity-ui/components';`

```typescript
interface ShareListProps {
  url: string;  // sharing link
  copyIcon?: IconData;  // custom copy link button icon
  copyTitle?: any;  // custom copy link button title
  direction?: LayoutDirection;  // elements location direction
  files?: File[];
  renderCopy?: ({ url, title, icon, }: { url: string; title: any; icon: IconData; }) => React.ReactElement;  // custom copy button render
  shareOptions?: ShareOptions[];  // share options list
  text?: string;
  title?: string;
  withCopyLink?: boolean;  // should show copy button
}
```

## SharePopover

**Import:** `import {SharePopover} from '@gravity-ui/components';`

```typescript
interface SharePopoverProps {
  url: string;  // sharing link
  autoclosable?: boolean;  // should close popover when cursor is outside
  buttonAriaLabel?: string;  // aria-label of button
  buttonTitle?: any;  // icon title
  closeDelay?: number;  // delay before popover will be hidden when cursor is otside
  copyIcon?: IconData;  // custom copy link button icon
  copyTitle?: any;  // custom copy link button title
  customIcon?: IconData;  // custom icon
  direction?: LayoutDirection;  // elements location direction
  files?: File[];
  iconClass?: string;  // icon control mixin
  iconSize?: number;  // control-icon size
  openByHover?: boolean;  // should open popover with hover
  placement?: PopupPlacement;  // popover opening direction
  renderCopy?: ({ url, title, icon, }: { url: string; title: any; icon: IconData; }) => React.ReactElement;  // custom copy button render
  shareOptions?: ShareOptions[];  // share options list
  switcherClassName?: string;  // sitcher mixin
  text?: string;
  title?: string;
  tooltipClassName?: string;  // tooltip mixin
  useWebShareApi?: boolean;  // Web Share API setting (share options can be specified for non supported api case)
  withCopyLink?: boolean;  // should show copy button
}
```

**Example:**

```tsx
<SharePopover buttonAriaLabel={'Share'} />
```

## StoreBadgePlatform

Store Badge can be used to place links to the Google Play and AppStore app…

**Import:** `import {StoreBadgePlatform} from '@gravity-ui/components';`

## StoreBadge

Store Badge can be used to place links to the Google Play and AppStore app…

**Import:** `import {StoreBadge} from '@gravity-ui/components';`

```typescript
interface StoreBadgeProps {
  platform: 'android' | 'ios';  // store platform name
  lang?: `${Lang}`;
  onClick?: HTMLElement;
}
```

**Example:**

```tsx
<StoreBadge platform={Platform.ANDROID} />
```

  disableOutsideClick?: boolean;
  initialStoryIndex?: number;
  onClose?: (event: any, reason: any) => void;
  onNextClick?: (storyIndex: number) => void;
  onPreviousClick?: (storyIndex: number) => void;
  resetStoryIndexOnClose?: boolean;
  syncInTabsKey?: string;
}

## Reactions

**Import:** `import {Reactions} from '@gravity-ui/components';`

```typescript
interface ReactionsProps {
  reactions: ReactionProps[];  // All available reactions.
  reactionsState: ReactionState[];  // Users' reactions.
  size: PaletteProps;
  addButtonPlacement?: 'start' | 'end';  // Position of the "Add reaction" button.
  onToggle?: (value: string) => void;  // Callback for clicking on a reaction in the Palette or directly in the reactions' list.
  paletteProps?: ReactionsPaletteProps;  // Reactions' palette props.
  popupClassName?: string;  // A class for the reaction container
  popupPlacement?: PopupPlacement;
  readOnly?: boolean;  // Reactions' readonly state (when a user is unable to react for some reason).
  renderAddReaction?: (props: RenderAddProps<AddReactionRef>) => React.ReactNode;
  renderReaction?: (props: RenderReactionProps) => React.ReactNode;  // Custom render function for the reaction button
Allows to fully customize the appearance of the button
  renderReactionsContent?: (props: { reactionList: React.ReactNode; addReactionButton: React.ReactNode; }) => React.ReactNode;  // Callback function to render custom reactions content.
  renderTooltip?: (state: ReactionState) => React.ReactNode;  // If present, when a user hovers over the reaction, a popover appears with renderTooltip(state) content.
Can be used to display users who used this reaction.
}
```

## CalendarInstance

Calendar is a flexible, user-friendly calendar component for React…

**Import:** `import {CalendarInstance} from '@gravity-ui/date-components';`

## Calendar

Calendar is a flexible, user-friendly calendar component for React…

**Import:** `import {Calendar} from '@gravity-ui/date-components';`

```typescript
interface CalendarProps {
  aria-describedby?: string;  // Identifies the element (or elements) that describes the object.
  aria-details?: string;  // Identifies the element (or elements) that provide a detailed, extended description for the object.
  aria-label?: string;  // Defines a string value that labels the current element.
  aria-labelledby?: string;  // Identifies the element (or elements) that labels the current element.
  autoFocus?: boolean;  // Whether to automatically focus the calendar when it mounts.
  defaultFocusedValue?: DateTime;  // The date that is focused when the calendar first mounts (uncontrolled).
  defaultMode?: 'days' | 'months' | 'quarters' | 'years';  // Initial mode to show in calendar (days, months or years)
  defaultValue?: CalendarValueType<M>;  // The default value (uncontrolled).
  disabled?: boolean;  // Whether the field is disabled.
  focusedValue?: any;  // Controls the currently focused date within the calendar.
  id?: string;  // The element's unique identifier.
  isDateUnavailable?: (date: DateTime) => boolean;  // Callback that is called for each date of the calendar. If it returns true, then the date is unavailable.
  isWeekend?: (date: DateTime) => boolean;  // Callback that is called for each date of the calendar. If it returns true, then the date is weekend.
  maxValue?: DateTime;  // The maximum allowed date that a user may select.
  minValue?: DateTime;  // The minimum allowed date that a user may select.
  mode?: 'days' | 'months' | 'quarters' | 'years';  // Controls what to show in calendar (days, months or years)
  modes?: Partial<Record<CalendarLayout, boolean>>;  // Controls which modes to use
  readOnly?: boolean;  // Whether the calendar value is immutable.
  selectionMode?: M;
  size?: 'm' | 'l' | 'xl';  // The size of the element.
  timeZone?: string;  // Which timezone use to show values. Example: 'default', 'system', 'Europe/Amsterdam'.
  value?: CalendarValueType<M>;  // The current value (controlled).
}
```

**Example:**

```tsx
<Calendar  />
```

## RangeCalendar

RangeCalendar is a powerful, flexible, and user-friendly UI component designed…

**Import:** `import {RangeCalendar} from '@gravity-ui/date-components';`

```typescript
interface RangeCalendarProps {
  aria-describedby?: string;  // Identifies the element (or elements) that describes the object.
  aria-details?: string;  // Identifies the element (or elements) that provide a detailed, extended description for the object.
  aria-label?: string;  // Defines a string value that labels the current element.
  aria-labelledby?: string;  // Identifies the element (or elements) that labels the current element.
  autoFocus?: boolean;  // Whether to automatically focus the calendar when it mounts.
  defaultFocusedValue?: DateTime;  // The date that is focused when the calendar first mounts (uncontrolled).
  defaultMode?: 'days' | 'months' | 'quarters' | 'years';  // Initial mode to show in calendar (days, months or years)
  defaultValue?: RangeValue<DateTime>;  // The default value (uncontrolled).
  disabled?: boolean;  // Whether the field is disabled.
  focusedValue?: any;  // Controls the currently focused date within the calendar.
  id?: string;  // The element's unique identifier.
  isDateUnavailable?: (date: DateTime) => boolean;  // Callback that is called for each date of the calendar. If it returns true, then the date is unavailable.
  isWeekend?: (date: DateTime) => boolean;  // Callback that is called for each date of the calendar. If it returns true, then the date is weekend.
  maxValue?: DateTime;  // The maximum allowed date that a user may select.
  minValue?: DateTime;  // The minimum allowed date that a user may select.
  mode?: 'days' | 'months' | 'quarters' | 'years';  // Controls what to show in calendar (days, months or years)
  modes?: Partial<Record<CalendarLayout, boolean>>;  // Controls which modes to use
  readOnly?: boolean;  // Whether the calendar value is immutable.
  size?: 'm' | 'l' | 'xl';  // The size of the element.
  timeZone?: string;  // Which timezone use to show values. Example: 'default', 'system', 'Europe/Amsterdam'.
  value?: RangeValue<DateTime>;  // The current value (controlled).
}
```

**Example:**

```tsx
<RangeCalendar  />
```

## DatePicker

DatePicker is a sophisticated, lightweight, and fully customizable component…

**Import:** `import {DatePicker} from '@gravity-ui/date-components';`

```typescript
interface DatePickerProps {
  errorMessage: TextInputBaseProps;
  errorPlacement: TextInputBaseProps;
  validationState: TextInputBaseProps;
  aria-describedby?: string;  // Identifies the element (or elements) that describes the object.
  aria-details?: string;  // Identifies the element (or elements) that provide a detailed, extended description for the object.
  aria-label?: string;  // Defines a string value that labels the current element.
  aria-labelledby?: string;  // Identifies the element (or elements) that labels the current element.
  autoFocus?: boolean;  // Whether the element should receive focus on render.
  defaultOpen?: boolean;  // Whether the popup is open by default (uncontrolled).
  defaultValue?: T;  // The default value (uncontrolled).
  disabled?: boolean;  // Whether the field is disabled.
  disableFocusTrap?: boolean;
  disablePortal?: boolean;
  form?: string;  // The id of a form element in the same document. If this attribute is not set,
the input element  is associated with its ancestor form element, if any.
  format?: string;  // Format of the date when rendered in the input. [Available formats](https://day.js.org/docs/en/display/format)
  hasClear?: boolean;  // Show clear button
  id?: string;  // The element's unique identifier.
  isDateUnavailable?: (date: DateTime) => boolean;  // Callback that is called for each date of the calendar. If it returns true, then the date is unavailable.
  label?: TextInputBaseProps;  // Inner field label
  maxValue?: DateTime;  // The maximum allowed date that a user may select.
  minValue?: DateTime;  // The minimum allowed date that a user may select.
  name?: string;  // The name of the input element, used when submitting an HTML form.
  open?: boolean;  // Whether the popup is open (controlled).
  parseDateFromString?: (dateStr: string, format: string, timeZone?: string) => DateTime;  // Custom parser function for parsing pasted date strings. If not provided, the default parser will be used.
  pin?: TextInputPin;  // Corner rounding
  placeholder?: string;  // Text that appears in the field when it has no value set
  placeholderValue?: DateTime;  // A placeholder date that controls the default values of each segment when the user first interacts with them. Defaults to today's date at midnight.
  popupClassName?: string;  // Sets the CSS className for the popup element.
  popupOffset?: PopupOffset;  // Popup offset relative to anchor
  popupPlacement?: PopupPlacement;  // Popup placement
  popupStyle?: CSSProperties;  // Sets the CSS style attribute for the popup element.
  readOnly?: boolean;  // Whether the calendar value is immutable.
  size?: TextInputSize;  // The size of the element
  timeZone?: string;  // Which timezone use to show values. Example: 'default', 'system', 'Europe/Amsterdam'.
  value?: T;  // The current value (controlled).
  view?: TextInputView;  // Control view
}
```

**Example:**

```tsx
<DatePicker  />
```

## DatePickerState

DatePicker is a sophisticated, lightweight, and fully customizable component…

**Import:** `import {DatePickerState} from '@gravity-ui/date-components';`

## DatePickerStateOptions

DatePicker is a sophisticated, lightweight, and fully customizable component…

**Import:** `import {DatePickerStateOptions} from '@gravity-ui/date-components';`

## RangeDatePicker

**Import:** `import {RangeDatePicker} from '@gravity-ui/date-components';`

```typescript
interface RangeDatePickerProps {
  errorMessage: TextInputBaseProps;
  errorPlacement: TextInputBaseProps;
  validationState: TextInputBaseProps;
  aria-describedby?: string;  // Identifies the element (or elements) that describes the object.
  aria-details?: string;  // Identifies the element (or elements) that provide a detailed, extended description for the object.
  aria-label?: string;  // Defines a string value that labels the current element.
  aria-labelledby?: string;  // Identifies the element (or elements) that labels the current element.
  autoFocus?: boolean;  // Whether the element should receive focus on render.
  defaultOpen?: boolean;  // Whether the popup is open by default (uncontrolled).
  defaultValue?: RangeValue<DateTime>;  // The default value (uncontrolled).
  disabled?: boolean;  // Whether the field is disabled.
  disableFocusTrap?: boolean;
  disablePortal?: boolean;
  form?: string;  // The id of a form element in the same document. If this attribute is not set,
the input element  is associated with its ancestor form element, if any.
  format?: string;  // Format of the date when rendered in the input. [Available formats](https://day.js.org/docs/en/display/format)
  hasClear?: boolean;  // Show clear button
  id?: string;  // The element's unique identifier.
  isDateUnavailable?: (date: DateTime) => boolean;  // Callback that is called for each date of the calendar. If it returns true, then the date is unavailable.
  label?: TextInputBaseProps;  // Inner field label
  maxValue?: DateTime;  // The maximum allowed date that a user may select.
  minValue?: DateTime;  // The minimum allowed date that a user may select.
  name?: string;  // The name of the input element, used when submitting an HTML form.
  open?: boolean;  // Whether the popup is open (controlled).
  parseDateFromString?: (dateStr: string, format: string, timeZone?: string) => DateTime;  // Custom parser function for parsing pasted date strings. If not provided, the default parser will be used.
  pin?: TextInputPin;  // Corner rounding
  placeholder?: string;  // Text that appears in the field when it has no value set
  placeholderValue?: DateTime;  // A placeholder date that controls the default values of each segment when the user first interacts with them. Defaults to today's date at midnight.
  popupClassName?: string;  // Sets the CSS className for the popup element.
  popupOffset?: PopupOffset;  // Popup offset relative to anchor
  popupPlacement?: PopupPlacement;  // Popup placement
  popupStyle?: CSSProperties;  // Sets the CSS style attribute for the popup element.
  readOnly?: boolean;  // Whether the calendar value is immutable.
  size?: TextInputSize;  // The size of the element
  timeZone?: string;  // Which timezone use to show values. Example: 'default', 'system', 'Europe/Amsterdam'.
  value?: RangeValue<DateTime>;  // The current value (controlled).
  view?: TextInputView;  // Control view
}
```

**Example:**

```tsx
<RangeDatePicker  />
```

**Import:** `import {RangeDatePickerState} from '@gravity-ui/date-components';`

## ViewportDimensions

**Import:** `import {ViewportDimensions} from '@gravity-ui/date-components';`

## ViewportInterval

**Import:** `import {ViewportInterval} from '@gravity-ui/date-components';`

## RangeDateSelection

**Import:** `import {RangeDateSelection} from '@gravity-ui/date-components';`

```typescript
interface RangeDateSelectionProps {
  align?: number;  // Alignment of the selection in milliseconds. Defaults to 1 second.
  aria-describedby?: string;  // Identifies the element (or elements) that describes the object.
  aria-details?: string;  // Identifies the element (or elements) that provide a detailed, extended description for the object.
  aria-label?: string;  // Defines a string value that labels the current element.
  aria-labelledby?: string;  // Identifies the element (or elements) that labels the current element.
  defaultValue?: RangeValue<DateTime>;  // The default value (uncontrolled).
  displayNow?: boolean;  // Displays now line
  draggableRuler?: boolean;  // Enables dragging ruler
  formatTime?: (time: DateTime) => string;  // Formats time ticks
  hasScaleButtons?: boolean;  // Displays buttons to scale selection
  id?: string;  // The element's unique identifier.
  maxDuration?: number;  // Maximum duration of the selection in milliseconds. Defaults to 15 years.
  maxValue?: DateTime;  // The maximum allowed date that a user may select.
  minDuration?: number;  // Minimum duration of the selection in milliseconds. Defaults to 1 second.
  minValue?: DateTime;  // The minimum allowed date that a user may select.
  numberOfIntervals?: number;  // The number of selection intervals that fit into the underlying ruler.
  placeholderValue?: DateTime;  // A placeholder date that controls the default values of each segment when the user first interacts with them. Defaults to today's date at midnight.
  placeOnRuler?: number;  // Place of the selection on the underlying ruler.
Value must be between 0 and 1, where 0 is the start of the ruler and 1 is the end.
  renderAdditionalRulerContent?: (props: { interval: ViewportInterval; dimensions: ViewportDimensions; }) => React.ReactNode;  // Renders additional svg content in the ruler
  scaleButtonsPosition?: 'start' | 'end';  // Position of scale buttons
  timeZone?: string;  // Which timezone use to show values. Example: 'default', 'system', 'Europe/Amsterdam'.
  value?: RangeValue<DateTime>;  // The current value (controlled).
}
```

**Example:**

```tsx
<RangeDateSelection  />
```

## RangeDateSelectionState

**Import:** `import {RangeDateSelectionState} from '@gravity-ui/date-components';`

## RangeDateSelectionOptions

**Import:** `import {RangeDateSelectionOptions} from '@gravity-ui/date-components';`

## RelativeDateField

RelativeDateField component is used only for entering relative dates. It can't…

**Import:** `import {RelativeDateField} from '@gravity-ui/date-components';`

```typescript
interface RelativeDateFieldProps {
  errorMessage: TextInputBaseProps;
  errorPlacement: TextInputBaseProps;
  validationState: TextInputBaseProps;
  aria-describedby?: string;  // Identifies the element (or elements) that describes the object.
  aria-details?: string;  // Identifies the element (or elements) that provide a detailed, extended description for the object.
  aria-label?: string;  // Defines a string value that labels the current element.
  aria-labelledby?: string;  // Identifies the element (or elements) that labels the current element.
  autoFocus?: boolean;  // Whether the element should receive focus on render.
  defaultValue?: string;  // The default value (uncontrolled).
  disabled?: boolean;  // Whether the field is disabled.
  endContent?: TextInputBaseProps;  // User`s node rendered after input and clear button
  form?: string;  // The id of a form element in the same document. If this attribute is not set,
the input element  is associated with its ancestor form element, if any.
  hasClear?: boolean;  // Show clear button
  hasTime?: boolean;  // Show time field in popup
  id?: string;  // The element's unique identifier.
  label?: TextInputBaseProps;  // Inner field label
  name?: string;  // The name of the input element, used when submitting an HTML form.
  pin?: TextInputPin;  // Corner rounding
  placeholder?: string;  // Text that appears in the field when it has no value set
  popupClassName?: string;  // Sets the CSS className for the popup element.
  popupOffset?: PopupOffset;  // Popup offset relative to anchor
  popupPlacement?: PopupPlacement;  // Popup placement
  popupStyle?: CSSProperties;  // Sets the CSS style attribute for the popup element.
  readOnly?: boolean;  // Whether the calendar value is immutable.
  roundUp?: boolean;  // Round up parsed date to the nearest granularity.
  size?: TextInputSize;  // The size of the element
  startContent?: TextInputBaseProps;  // User`s node rendered before label and input
  timeZone?: string;
  value?: string;  // The current value (controlled).
  view?: TextInputView;  // Control view
}
```

**Example:**

```tsx
<RelativeDateField  />
```

## RelativeDateFieldState

RelativeDateField component is used only for entering relative dates. It can't…

**Import:** `import {RelativeDateFieldState} from '@gravity-ui/date-components';`

## RelativeDateFieldOptions

RelativeDateField component is used only for entering relative dates. It can't…

**Import:** `import {RelativeDateFieldOptions} from '@gravity-ui/date-components';`

## RelativeDatePicker

RelativeDatePicker is almost the same component as DatePicker but it has…

**Import:** `import {RelativeDatePicker} from '@gravity-ui/date-components';`

```typescript
interface RelativeDatePickerProps {
  errorMessage: TextInputBaseProps;
  errorPlacement: TextInputBaseProps;
  validationState: TextInputBaseProps;
  aria-describedby?: string;  // Identifies the element (or elements) that describes the object.
  aria-details?: string;  // Identifies the element (or elements) that provide a detailed, extended description for the object.
  aria-label?: string;  // Defines a string value that labels the current element.
  aria-labelledby?: string;  // Identifies the element (or elements) that labels the current element.
  autoFocus?: boolean;  // Whether the element should receive focus on render.
  defaultValue?: { type: 'absolute'; value: DateTime; } | { type: 'relative'; value: string; };  // The default value (uncontrolled).
  disabled?: boolean;  // Whether the field is disabled.
  form?: string;  // The id of a form element in the same document. If this attribute is not set,
the input element  is associated with its ancestor form element, if any.
  format?: string;  // Format of the date when rendered in the input. [Available formats](https://day.js.org/docs/en/display/format)
  hasClear?: boolean;  // Show clear button
  id?: string;  // The element's unique identifier.
  isDateUnavailable?: (date: DateTime) => boolean;  // Callback that is called for each date of the calendar. If it returns true, then the date is unavailable.
  label?: TextInputBaseProps;  // Inner field label
  maxValue?: DateTime;  // The maximum allowed date that a user may select.
  minValue?: DateTime;  // The minimum allowed date that a user may select.
  name?: string;  // The name of the input element, used when submitting an HTML form.
  onOpenChange?: (open: boolean) => void;  // Handler that is called when the popup's open state changes.
  parseDateFromString?: (dateStr: string, format: string, timeZone?: string) => DateTime;  // Custom parser function for parsing pasted date strings. If not provided, the default parser will be used.
  pin?: TextInputPin;  // Corner rounding
  placeholder?: string;  // Text that appears in the field when it has no value set
  placeholderValue?: DateTime;  // A placeholder date that controls the default values of each segment when the user first interacts with them. Defaults to today's date at midnight.
  popupClassName?: string;  // Sets the CSS className for the popup element.
  popupOffset?: PopupOffset;  // Popup offset relative to anchor
  popupPlacement?: PopupPlacement;  // Popup placement
  popupStyle?: CSSProperties;  // Sets the CSS style attribute for the popup element.
  readOnly?: boolean;  // Whether the calendar value is immutable.
  roundUp?: boolean;  // Round up parsed date to the nearest granularity.
  size?: TextInputSize;  // The size of the element
  timeZone?: string;  // Which timezone use to show values. Example: 'default', 'system', 'Europe/Amsterdam'.
  value?: { type: 'absolute'; value: DateTime; } | { type: 'relative'; value: string; };  // The current value (controlled).
  view?: TextInputView;  // Control view
}
```

**Example:**

```tsx
<RelativeDatePicker  />
```

**Import:** `import {RelativeDatePickerState} from '@gravity-ui/date-components';`

## RangeDateField

**Import:** `import {RangeDateField} from '@gravity-ui/date-components';`

```typescript
interface RangeDateFieldProps {
  errorMessage: TextInputBaseProps;
  errorPlacement: TextInputBaseProps;
  validationState: TextInputBaseProps;
  aria-describedby?: string;  // Identifies the element (or elements) that describes the object.
  aria-details?: string;  // Identifies the element (or elements) that provide a detailed, extended description for the object.
  aria-label?: string;  // Defines a string value that labels the current element.
  aria-labelledby?: string;  // Identifies the element (or elements) that labels the current element.
  autoFocus?: boolean;  // Whether the element should receive focus on render.
  defaultValue?: RangeValue<DateTime>;  // The default value (uncontrolled).
  delimiter?: string;  // Delimiter separating the start and end parts of the range.
  disabled?: boolean;  // Whether the field is disabled.
  endContent?: TextInputBaseProps;  // User`s node rendered after input and clear button
  form?: string;  // The id of a form element in the same document. If this attribute is not set,
the input element  is associated with its ancestor form element, if any.
  format?: string;  // Format of the date when rendered in the input. [Available formats](https://day.js.org/docs/en/display/format)
  hasClear?: boolean;  // Show clear button
  id?: string;  // The element's unique identifier.
  isDateUnavailable?: (date: DateTime) => boolean;  // Callback that is called for each date of the calendar. If it returns true, then the date is unavailable.
  label?: TextInputBaseProps;  // Inner field label
  maxValue?: DateTime;  // The maximum allowed date that a user may select.
  minValue?: DateTime;  // The minimum allowed date that a user may select.
  name?: string;  // The name of the input element, used when submitting an HTML form.
  parseDateFromString?: (dateStr: string, format: string, timeZone?: string) => DateTime;  // Custom parser function for parsing pasted date strings. If not provided, the default parser will be used.
  pin?: TextInputPin;  // Corner rounding
  placeholder?: string;  // Text that appears in the field when it has no value set
  placeholderValue?: DateTime;  // A placeholder date that controls the default values of each segment when the user first interacts with them. Defaults to today's date at midnight.
  readOnly?: boolean;  // Whether the calendar value is immutable.
  size?: TextInputSize;  // The size of the element
  startContent?: TextInputBaseProps;  // User`s node rendered before label and input
  timeZone?: string;  // Which timezone use to show values. Example: 'default', 'system', 'Europe/Amsterdam'.
  value?: RangeValue<DateTime>;  // The current value (controlled).
  view?: TextInputView;  // Control view
}
```

**Example:**

```tsx
<RangeDateField  />
```

## RelativeRangeDatePickerDialog

**Import:** `import {RelativeRangeDatePickerDialog} from '@gravity-ui/date-components';`

```typescript
interface RelativeRangeDatePickerDialogProps {
  anchor: HTMLElement;  // Popup anchor
  open: boolean;  // Manages `Popup` visibility
  allowNullableValues?: boolean;
  applyPresetsImmediately?: boolean;  // Apply presets immediately
  defaultTimeZone?: string;
  defaultValue?: RelativeRangeDatePickerValue;
  docs?: Preset[];  // Custom docs for picker, if empty array docs will be hidden
  format?: string;  // Format of the date when rendered in the input. [Available formats](https://day.js.org/docs/en/display/format)
  id?: string;  // The element's unique identifier.
  isDateUnavailable?: (date: DateTime, endpoint: 'start' | 'end') => boolean;  // Callback that is called for each date of the calendar. If it returns true, then the date is unavailable.
  isMobile?: boolean;  // If true `Sheet` is used instead of `Popup`
  maxValue?: DateTime;  // The maximum allowed date that a user may select.
  minValue?: DateTime;  // The minimum allowed date that a user may select.
  modal?: boolean;  // If true `Popup` act like a modal dialog
  placeholderValue?: DateTime;  // A placeholder date that controls the default values of each segment when the user first interacts with them. Defaults to today's date at midnight.
  popupClassName?: string;  // Sets the CSS className for the popup element.
  popupOffset?: PopupOffset;  // Popup offset relative to anchor
  popupPlacement?: PopupPlacement;  // Popup placement
  popupStyle?: CSSProperties;  // Sets the CSS style attribute for the popup element.
  presetTabs?: PresetTab[];  // Custom preset tabs
  readOnly?: boolean;  // Whether the values is immutable.
  returnFocus?: PopupProps;  // Element which focus should be returned to
  size?: TextInputSize;  // The size of the element
  timeZone?: string;
  value?: RelativeRangeDatePickerValue;
  withApplyButton?: boolean;  // Apply changes with button
  withHeader?: boolean;  // Show header with docs tooltip
  withPresets?: boolean;  // Show relative range presets
  withZonesList?: boolean;  // Show time zone selector
}
```

## RelativeRangeDatePickerForm

**Import:** `import {RelativeRangeDatePickerForm} from '@gravity-ui/date-components';`

```typescript
interface RelativeRangeDatePickerFormProps {
  allowNullableValues?: boolean;
  applyPresetsImmediately?: boolean;  // Apply presets immediately
  defaultTimeZone?: string;
  defaultValue?: RelativeRangeDatePickerValue;
  docs?: Preset[];  // Custom docs for picker, if empty array docs will be hidden
  format?: string;  // Format of the date when rendered in the input. [Available formats](https://day.js.org/docs/en/display/format)
  id?: string;  // The element's unique identifier.
  isDateUnavailable?: (date: DateTime, endpoint: 'start' | 'end') => boolean;  // Callback that is called for each date of the calendar. If it returns true, then the date is unavailable.
  maxValue?: DateTime;  // The maximum allowed date that a user may select.
  minValue?: DateTime;  // The minimum allowed date that a user may select.
  placeholderValue?: DateTime;  // A placeholder date that controls the default values of each segment when the user first interacts with them. Defaults to today's date at midnight.
  presetTabs?: PresetTab[];  // Custom preset tabs
  readOnly?: boolean;  // Whether the values is immutable.
  size?: TextInputSize;  // The size of the element
  timeZone?: string;
  value?: RelativeRangeDatePickerValue;
  withApplyButton?: boolean;  // Apply changes with button
  withHeader?: boolean;  // Show header with docs tooltip
  withPresets?: boolean;  // Show relative range presets
  withZonesList?: boolean;  // Show time zone selector
}
```

## AsideHeader

AsideHeader is provided a flexible and customizable navigation experience…

**Import:** `import {AsideHeader} from '@gravity-ui/navigation';`

```typescript
interface AsideHeaderProps {
  pinned: boolean;  // Navigation visual state. When `true`, the navigation is expanded (pinned open). When `false`, it is collapsed.
  collapseButtonWrapper?: (defaultButton: React.ReactNode, data: { isExpanded: boolean; onChangePinned?: (pinned: boolean) => void; }) => React.ReactNode;
  collapseTitle?: string;
  customBackground?: React.ReactNode;
  customBackgroundClassName?: string;
  defaultMenuGroups?: MenuGroup[];
  defaultMenuItems?: AsideHeaderItem[];
  editMenuProps?: EditMenuProps;
  expandTitle?: string;
  headerDecoration?: boolean;
  hideCollapseButton?: boolean;
  isCompactMode?: boolean;  // When `true`, menu items use compact height.
  logo?: LogoProps;
  menuGroups?: MenuGroup[];
  menuItems?: AsideHeaderItem[];
  menuMoreTitle?: string;
  openModalSubscriber?: (subscriber: OpenModalSubscriber) => void;
  panelItems?: PanelItemProps[];
  renderContent?: RenderContentType;
  renderFooter?: (data: { size: number; isExpanded: boolean; isPinned: boolean; asideRef: HTMLDivElement; isCompactMode?: boolean; }) => any;  // Render function for the footer section.

Return types:
- `React.ReactNode` - Renders custom content as-is
- `React.ReactNode[]` - Wraps in FooterBar with horizontal/vertical layout based on isPinned
  renderFooterAfter?: (options?: { setCollapseBlocker?: SetCollapseBlocker; }) => React.ReactNode;  // Render function for additional content after items (e.g., user profile). Receives options with setCollapseBlocker to block sidebar collapse while a popup is open.
  subheaderItems?: AsideHeaderItem[];
  topAlert?: TopAlertBaseProps | { render: (params: { handleClose: () => void; }) => React.ReactElement; };
}
```

**Example:**

```tsx
<Flex
                direction="row"
                justifyContent="center"
                alignItems="center"
                gap={4}
                style={{
                    position: 'relative',
                    padding: '8px',
                    background:
                        ' linear-gradient(120deg, #191654, #43cea2 40%, #185a9d 70%, #f857a6 100%)',
                }}
            >
                <Text variant="subheader-2" style={{color: 'var(--g-color-text-light-primary)'}}>
                    We&apos;ve got something new for you to try!
                </Text>
                <Button view="normal-contrast" size="m">
                    Try Now
                </Button>
                <Button view="outlined-contrast" size="m">
                    Learn More
                </Button>
                <Button
                    style={{position: 'absolute', right: '8px'}}
                    view="flat-contrast"
                    aria-label="Close"
                    onClick={handleClose}
                >
                    <Icon data={Xmark} size={18} />
                </Button>
            </Flex>
```

## FooterItem

AsideHeader is provided a flexible and customizable navigation experience…

**Import:** `import {FooterItem} from '@gravity-ui/navigation';`

```typescript
interface FooterItemProps {
  id: string;
  title: React.ReactNode;
  bringForward?: boolean;
  current?: boolean;
  enableTooltip?: boolean;
  groupId?: string;  // The group ID to which the menu item belongs. Used for grouping menu items
  hidden?: boolean;  // Visibility flag in the side menu
  href?: string;
  icon?: IconProps;
  iconQa?: string;
  iconSize?: string | number;
  isExpanded?: boolean;  // When `true`, forces the item to display in expanded form.
  itemWrapper?: (p: MakeItemParams, makeItem: (p: MakeItemParams) => React.ReactNode, opts: { isExpanded: boolean; item: MenuItem; ref: HTMLElement; setCollapseBlocker: SetCollapseBlocker; }) => React.ReactNode;
  layout?: 'horizontal' | 'vertical';  // Layout mode: 'horizontal' shows icon only, 'vertical' shows icon and title. Used by FooterBar.
  popupKeepMounted?: PopupProps;
  popupOffset?: PopupProps;
  popupPlacement?: PopupProps;
  popupRef?: HTMLElement;  // Floating element anchor ref object
  popupVisible?: PopupProps;
  preventUserRemoving?: boolean;
  renderPopupContent?: () => React.ReactNode;
  rightAdornment?: React.ReactNode;
  tooltipText?: React.ReactNode;
  type?: 'regular' | 'action' | 'divider';
}
```

```typescript
interface HotkeysPanelProps {
  container: DrawerProps;
  hideVeil: DrawerProps;
  hotkeys: HotkeysGroup<T>[];
  open: boolean;
  drawerItemClassName?: string;
  emptyState?: ReactNode;
  filterable?: boolean;
  filterClassName?: string;
  filterPlaceholder?: string;
  itemContentClassName?: string;
  leftOffset?: string | number;
  listClassName?: string;
  onClose?: () => void;
  platform?: HotkeyProps;
  title?: ReactNode;
  titleClassName?: string;
  togglePanelHotkey?: string;
  topOffset?: string | number;
}
```

**Import:** `import {MobileHeader} from '@gravity-ui/navigation';`

```typescript
interface MobileHeaderProps {
  burgerMenu: BurgerMenuProps;
  logo: LogoProps;
  burgerCloseTitle?: string;
  burgerOpenTitle?: string;
  contentClassName?: string;
  onClosePanel?: () => void;
  onEvent?: (itemName: string, eventName: MobileHeaderEvent) => void;
  overlapPanel?: OverlapPanelProps;
  panelItems?: PanelItemProps[];
  renderContent?: RenderContentType;
  sideItemRenderContent?: RenderContentType;
  topAlert?: TopAlertBaseProps | { render: (params: { handleClose: () => void; }) => React.ReactElement; };
}
```

## Logo

Logo icon is wrapped in UIKit Button, text is wrapped in HTML tag a or div,…

**Import:** `import {Logo} from '@gravity-ui/navigation';`

**Example:**

```tsx
<Logo text={'Service'} icon={logoIcon} href={'#'} onClick={() => alert('click on logo')} 'aria-label'={'Service'} />
```

## MobileLogo

**Import:** `import {MobileLogo} from '@gravity-ui/navigation';`

```typescript
interface MobileLogoProps {
  isExpanded: boolean;
  text: string | (() => React.ReactNode);
  aria-label?: string;
  aria-labelledby?: string;
  href?: string;
  icon?: IconProps;
  iconClassName?: string;
  iconSize?: number;
  iconSrc?: string;
  target?: HTMLAttributeAnchorTarget;
  textSize?: number;
  wrapper?: (node: React.ReactNode, isExpanded: boolean) => React.ReactNode;  // Wrapper function for the logo. The `isExpanded` parameter indicates if the navigation is expanded.
}
```

**Example:**

```tsx
<MobileLogo text={'Service'} icon={logoIcon} href={'#'} onClick={() => alert('click on logo')} />
```

## Design Tokens

### Spacing

- spacing-0: 0px
- spacing-1: 4px
- spacing-2: 8px
- spacing-3: 12px
- spacing-4: 16px
- spacing-5: 20px
- spacing-6: 24px
- spacing-7: 28px
- spacing-8: 32px
- spacing-9: 36px
- spacing-10: 40px
- spacing-0.5: 2px

### Breakpoints

- xs: 0px
- s: 576px
- m: 768px
- l: 1080px
- xl: 1200px
- xxl: 1400px
- xxxl: 1920px

### Sizes

- size-xs: 20px
- size-s: 24px
- size-m: 28px
- size-l: 36px
- size-xl: 44px
